/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -W -Wall -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libProjectXBalloon.dylib -install_name @rpath/libProjectXBalloon.dylib CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/BinaryFileManipulater.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/CRC16.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/CommandBuilder.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/DocumentBuilder.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/GNSSForISAS.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/MongoDBClient.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/QLForProjectX.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/SocketTransceiver.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/SocketTransceiver_UDP.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/TelemetryDefinition.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/TelemetryReceiver.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/TelemetryReceiver_UDP.cc.o CMakeFiles/ProjectXBalloon.dir/src/WaitFor.cc.o   -L/Users/syn/ANLNext/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/syn/ANLNext/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -lANLNext -lmongocxx -lbsoncxx
